name: Figma Make Source Sync And Preview Verification
decision: R-2 can close the local/Git/source-sync evidence gate, but independent Figma Make preview verification is blocked because the only Make proxy URL available from the original error now returns 404 JSON.

gitSource.finding: Remote branch codex/pwa-cloudflare matches local HEAD, but the checkout contains uncommitted R-1/report changes. Remote and Figma Make parity for those local changes is not independently proven by this Git check.

figmaMakeSourceScope.finding: No local Skeleton/src/app export is present to diff against. R-2 therefore validates the local E-1 source inventory and requires a current Figma Make preview URL for runtime proof.

staleRuntimeFindings.finding: The original CONTACT_INFO runtime error is not present in local source.
Local source uses the shared Toaster path required by the current app structure.
Local source uses the current i18n and theme paths.

figmaPreviewProbe.finding: The old URL no longer reproduces the CONTACT_INFO error and cannot prove current preview health. A current Figma Make preview or figma.com/make URL is required.

qualityGateResults.command: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git rev-parse HEAD && git log -1 --pretty=format:'%H%n%ci%n%s' && git remote -v

rg -n "CONTACT_INFO|from ['\"]\.?\.?/LanguageContext['\"]|from ['\"]\.?\.?/ThemeContext['\"]|from ['\"].*components/Toaster|components/Toaster" src/SiteApp.tsx src/main.tsx src/components src/i18n src/theme src/utils src/config src/lib package.json --glob '!node_modules'

/Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Run the Mitra Auto production build for R-2. Return exactly: status passed/failed, generated output directory if any, warnings grouped by tool/file, and fatal errors if any. Do not include routine Vite transform progress." -- npm run build

blockers.blocker: Provide a current Figma Make preview URL or figma.com/make URL after the push so independent browser/MCP verification can prove the preview renders without CONTACT_INFO or stale import runtime errors.
Decide whether the uncommitted local R-1/report changes are intended to be part of the Git/Figma Make parity baseline before declaring the pushed source fully current.

nextTask: R-3 - Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed deployment parity
